ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.name: Alarm policy name
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.state: Policy status. Valid values: ENABLED - enabled, DISABLED - disabled
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.target.type: Target type. Valid values: `ALL_SERVICES` - all services, `SERVICE_TAGS` - service tags, `SERVICES` - service instances
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.target.services: Target service name list, required when type=SERVICES
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.metricKind: Metric category. Valid values: SERVER - server-side performance, CLIENT - client-side performance, DB - database metrics, PRODUCER - producer, CONSUMER - consumer, INTERNAL_FUNCTION - internal function, JVM - JVM monitoring, EXCEPTION - exception monitoring, LLM - LLM performance metrics, LLM_OPERATION - LLM operation metrics, LLM_TOKEN_ANALYSIS - token analysis metrics
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.rule.operator: Logical operator. Valid values: `and` - AND, `or` - OR. Required when used as a logical composite node
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.rule.rules: Sub-rule list, required when operator is and/or
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.rule.metric: Metric name, required when used as a leaf node (metric expression)
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.rule.windowInSeconds: Aggregation window in seconds, minimum value is 60
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.rule.aggregate: Aggregation method. Valid values: `avg` - average, `max` - maximum, `min` - minimum, `sum` - sum, `p90` - 90th percentile, `p95` - 95th percentile, `p99` - 99th percentile, `count_per_second` - count per second
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.filters.operator: Filter operation. Valid values: `eq` - equals, `ne` - not equals, `contains` - contains, `not_contain` - does not contain, `re_match` - regex match, `re_not_match` - regex not match, `iterate` - iterate
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.filters.values: Dimension value list; if `*` is included, all values of that dimension are iterated
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger threshold; number of consecutive threshold breaches before an alarm is fired
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.renotifyIntervalInMinutes: Re-notification interval in minutes; set to 0 to disable re-notification
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.renotifyCount: Maximum number of re-notifications; set to 0 to disable re-notification
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.notifyRecovery: Whether to send a notification upon recovery
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.onMissingData: Behavior when data is missing. Valid values: SHOW_NO_DATA_AND_NOTIFY - show no-data status and send alarm notification, SHOW_NO_DATA - show no-data status without sending notification, SHOW_OK - resolve alarm, EVALUATE_AS_ZERO - treat missing data as 0 and compare against rule threshold
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.noDataNotifyPendingIntervalInMinutes: No-data alarm wait interval in minutes; required when onMissingData is SHOW_NO_DATA_AND_NOTIFY; set to 0 to trigger the no-data alarm immediately
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.level: Alarm severity level, default is CRITICAL. Valid values: NOTICE - notice, WARNING - warning, MAJOR - major, CRITICAL - critical
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.actions: Notification template list, used for anomaly notifications, recovery notifications, and re-alarm notifications
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.actions.alias: Notification template name, returned in query responses only
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.actions.callBacks: Callback URL list, returned in query responses only
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.actions.disableTimes: Mute time window list, returned in query responses only
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.actions.members: Member list, returned in query responses only
ApmCreateAlarmPolicy.actions.types: Notification type list (e.g. EMAIL), returned in query responses only
